name: QA 1793
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1793

Test pmrep and pcp2xxx labels handling



Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce

Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:
